title: Aswan ⇄ Luxor
summary: A leisurely seven-night sail along the classic Nile route, with time to linger at every temple and island between Aswan and Luxor.
routeOverview: Seven unhurried nights on the classic stretch of the Nile, with extra time ashore and on deck. Sailable in either direction.

timeline.title: Detailed day-by-day coming soon
timeline.description: We're finalising the full daily programme for this voyage. Contact us and we'll share the complete itinerary, tailored to your dates and group.
